title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 14–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Usopp, Dorry, Unknown person #14, King Harald as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We'll never yield to these demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: a whole century of duels... we had a grand-time of it together, didn't we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Their heads are even back in place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our gruesome corpses weren't a pretty sight for you all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it seems your body returns to working shape the moment you're flipped back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we can go all out against the rest, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's no need to hold back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we know, we just need to land fatal blows and they'll be restored!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means logging off their heads will work...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We can even gauge their hearts out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's totally out of the question! I mean they're our friends, right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! Get all the kids back home!! They shouldn't be here!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Yeah, this is really breaking my heart...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
